tasks.description: Fix activity page 'Unknown' user display (P1 regression) + add empty state guidance text
acceptance_criteria: page.tsx line 25: change .select("*") to .select("*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)") so initial load entries include user email
Activity entries on initial load show user email instead of 'Unknown'
Load More entries continue to work (API route already has the correct join)
Both page.tsx server query and route.ts client query use identical .select() shape
IMP-018: Activity empty state shows guidance hint below 'No activity yet': 'Actions like creating steps, adding comments, and completing runbooks appear here.'

patterns_to_follow: API route line 32: .select("*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)") — page.tsx must match this exact shape
ActivityLog type in database.ts already has users?: { email: string } | null — no type changes needed
activity-view.tsx line 171: entry.users?.email ?? 'Unknown' already handles the optional field correctly
learnings_relevant: Server/API query mismatch: BOTH page.tsx (server) and route.ts (client) queries must use the same .select() shape. Updating only one causes initial vs Load More display discrepancy. See LEARNINGS.md.
activity-view.tsx line 171 reads entry.users?.email — this works once page.tsx adds the join

tasks.special_instructions:
BUG-019 attempt 2. Previous attempt (iter 92) updated route.ts but forgot page.tsx. The fix is ONE LINE: page.tsx line 25 change .select("*") to .select("*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)"). Do NOT touch route.ts — it already has the correct join. IMP-018: Add a

guidance text below the 'No activity yet' message in the empty state block at activity-view.tsx lines 138-145. Style: text-[12px] text-[var(--text-tertiary)] mt-1.

tasks.description: Conditional step coloring — data layer [1/2]: migration (coloring_rules table + criteria_type enum), types, API CRUD routes, client wrappers
acceptance_criteria: New migration 019_coloring_rules.sql creates: criteria_type enum (status, executor, step_type, has_role, maturity_below, maturity_above), coloring_rules table with id (uuid PK default uuid_generate_v4()), workspace_id (FK workspaces NOT NULL), name (text NOT NULL), color (text NOT NULL), criteria_type (criteria_type NOT NULL), criteria_value (text NOT NULL), is_active (boolean DEFAULT true), position (integer DEFAULT 0), created_at (timestamptz DEFAULT now()), updated_at (timestamptz DEFAULT now())
RLS enabled: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies via can_access_workspace(workspace_id)
Reuse existing set_updated_at() trigger function — do NOT recreate it
Index on (workspace_id) for list query performance
ColoringRule interface and CriteriaType union type added to src/types/database.ts
GET /api/v1/coloring-rules?workspace_id= returns ColoringRule[] ordered by position ASC

POST /api/v1/coloring-rules creates rule, validates: workspace_id required, name required, color required (hex format via HEX_COLOR_REGEX), criteria_type required (must be valid enum value), criteria_value required
PATCH /api/v1/coloring-rules/[id] updates provided fields, validates color format if provided
All mutation routes include void logActivity() calls with entity_type: 'coloring_rules'
Client wrappers added to client.ts: fetchColoringRules, createColoringRule, updateColoringRule, deleteColoringRule

similar_files: supabase/migrations/014_comments.sql — enum + table + RLS + indexes + trigger pattern
src/app/api/v1/comments/route.ts — GET list + POST create pattern with workspace_id
src/app/api/v1/comments/[id]/route.ts — PATCH + DELETE by id pattern
patterns_to_follow: Migration: CREATE TYPE criteria_type AS ENUM (...); CREATE TABLE coloring_rules (...); ALTER TABLE ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY ... USING (can_access_workspace(workspace_id)); CREATE TRIGGER set_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE
API: auth guard → validate params → Supabase query → successResponse/errorResponse
Color validation: HEX_COLOR_REGEX = /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i from perspectives route (IMP-001)
Client: apiFetch<ColoringRule[]> for list, apiFetch<ColoringRule> for mutations
logActivity: void logActivity({ workspace_id, user_id, action, entity_type: 'coloring_rules', entity_id, entity_name })
learnings_relevant: void prefix on logActivity() — BUG-018 resolution pattern
Supabase RLS silent mutations — check if data is null after mutations, return 403/404
set_updated_at() trigger exists from migration 015 — reuse it, do NOT CREATE OR REPLACE

tasks.special_instructions: Data layer only — no UI in this sub-task ([2/2] UI will be next iteration). Follow exact patterns from comments (014) and tasks (015) migrations. Enum name: criteria_type. Table: coloring_rules. Migration number: 019 (018 = clone_workspace). Reuse set_updated_at() trigger — DO NOT recreate it. Add HEX_COLOR_REGEX validation in POST/PATCH routes (copy from perspectives/route.ts). Shared files (database.ts, client.ts) are exclusively owned by this slot — slot 1 does NOT modify them. Import ColoringRule and CriteriaType in client.ts alongside existing type imports.

shared_files.note: FEAT-051 exclusively owns types/database.ts and lib/api/client.ts for this iteration. BUG-019 slot reads them but does NOT modify.
